channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L115B06 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 22, 07:00 - 08:00 UTC

Jun 23, 17:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 22/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 08:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, servers in the rack L115B06 will be temporarily unavailable.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A07 - W17A04 - W17A03 - W17A02 - W17A01 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A07
- Rack W17A04
- Rack W17A03
- Rack W17A02
- Rack W17A01

Start time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A09 - W17A10 - W17A11 - W17A14 - W17B08 Maintenance Notification
item.description:

item.title: [YYZ][Dedicated Servers] - Room YYZ0101 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 12:30 - 13:30 UTC

Jun 22, 16:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack YYZ0101B02A
- Rack YYZ0101B02A


Start time : 08/07/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 13:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW][Dedicated Servers] - Room WAW0118A maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 7, 12:30 - 16:30 UTC

Jun 22, 16:16 UTC

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 2, 23:30 UTC  -  Jul 3, 02:30 UTC

Jun 16, 21:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in GRA1.

List of concerned racks :
- G107A04
- G107A05
- G107A06
- G107A08
- G107A09
- G107A11
- G107A12
- G107A13
- G107A14
- G107A15
- G107B04
- G107B07
- G107B08
- G107B11
- G107B14
- G107B15
- G108A03
- G108A04
- G122B12
- G122B13
- G122B14
- G122B15

Start time : 02/07/2026 23:30 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 02:30 UTC
Service impact : Network disruption and temporary loss of vRack access may occur during the maintenance window.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be performing maintenance on a network device.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA2][Infrastructure] - Rack G263B14 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 30, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure in Rack G263B14.

Start time : 30/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM][Storage and Backups] - Enterprise File Storage maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 30, 05:00 - 11:00 UTC

Jun 15, 15:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Storage and Backups offer.

Start time : 30/06/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 11:00 UTC
Service impact : Some Storage Enterprise File Storage services used with vRack Services will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 1 minute during the maintenance period.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Storage infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [SBG5][Cooling System] - Rack SBG0506A07B maintenance notification
item.description:
Jun 23, 16:22 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 23, 12:20 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 23, 12:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 23/06/2026 11:55 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0327A04A Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 23, 15:50 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the rack GRA0327A04A has been resolved.

Start time : 23/06/2026 14:36 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 15:35 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 14:50 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack GRA0327A04A.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 23/06/2026 14:36 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack GRA0327A04A are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks incident notification
item.description:
Jun 23, 09:14 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 22/06/2026 23:12 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 09:03 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 02:56 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Servers in rack 46N01 are no longer impacted by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are currently working on impacted servers in rack 46N08.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understandin

Jun 23, 02:03 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Servers in rack 46N07 are no longer impacted by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are currently working on impacted servers in racks 46N01 and 46N08.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 01:49 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Servers in rack 46N05 are no longer impacted by this incident.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are currently working on impacted servers in the other racks.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 23, 00:17 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks racks 46N01, 46N05, 46N07 and 46N08.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/06/2026 23:12 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack 46N01, 46N05, 46N07 and 46N08 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Jun 22, 23:43 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the racks 46N01, 46N05, 46N07 and 46N08.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/06/2026 23:12 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack 46N01, 46N05, 46N07 and 46N08 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0328A03C Incident Notification
item.description:

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 22, 11:48 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack GRA0328A03C.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/06/2026 11:19 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the rack GRA0328A03C are no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/06/2026 05:54 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the rack 46N07 are no longer able to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located on the specified rack.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

item.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 45D37 incident notification
item.description:

Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers.

Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

item.title: [GRA][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 21, 09:43 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Virtual Private Servers offer in the GRA region which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/06/2026 07:28 UTC
End time : 21/06/2026 07:39 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers in the GRA region were temporarily unreachable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access and use their Virtual Private Servers in the GRA region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 21, 09:16 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Virtual Private Servers offer in the GRA region which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/06/2026 08:38 UTC
End time : 21/06/2026 08:47 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers in the GRA region were temporarily unreachable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access and use their Virtual Private Servers in the GRA region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA][Storage and Backups] - Block Storage incident notification
item.description:
Jun 21, 05:14 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Block Storage offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/06/2026 04:48 UTC
End time : 21/06/2026 04:54 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The block storage service was temporarily unavailable for some customers.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access their storage located in GRA regions.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected infrastructure failure.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.
